full_text:
Yu Jin (Wenze) 于禁 (文則)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yu Jin (于禁), styledWenze (文則), was born in Ju Ping County, Tai Shan Commandery (Presently south-west of Tai’an City in Shan Dong Province). Served Cao Cao. Surrendered to Guan Yu. Shamed by Cao Pi into suicide. Yu Jin was affiliated with Bao Xin and the Wei Kingdom. Yu Jin lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
